_comment: OctoBuddy config. Single file at ~/.octobuddy/config.json. Top-level rateLimit/context are shared runtime policy. Bot identity, API URL, agent routing, env, group policy, and persona-clone config are per-bot only. Secrets are not written here: config stores secretRef entries that are resolved from the secret backend at runtime.

bots._comment_tokens: octoToken and agent.gatewayToken are intentionally absent. The desktop app stores them in the secret backend and injects them into octobuddy-daemon at runtime. Headless deployments may still provide inline tokens if they accept config-file exposure.

agent._comment_cron: Set cron=true to enable this bot's scheduled tasks (#115): owner-gated cron.create/list/delete over the control bus, fired through the gateway. Off by default.
agent._comment_toolProgress: Opt-in: when true, the bot mirrors each tool it runs to the channel as a brief 'Running <tool>(<params>)...' notice (deduped, capped at 10/turn). Off by default.
agent._comment_inheritUserConfig: When true, the agent inherits the operator's ~/.claude (user-scope skills + installed plugins). OFF by default: each bot gets an isolated CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR (~/.octobuddy/<id>/.claude).
agent._comment_dispatchTimeoutSec: Per-turn IDLE timeout (seconds). Omit to use the daemon default (1200 = 20 min).
agent._comment_env: Env is per-bot. Use {"value":"..."} for non-secret values and {"secretRef":"env/NAME"} for values stored in the secret backend.

bots._comment_groupConfigDir: Optional operator-controlled directory of per-conversation instruction files. Must be outside this bot's agent-writable workspace.
bots._comment_gating: Optional per-bot group-gating policy (session-router). trigger.mentionFreeGroups = channel ids the bot answers WITHOUT an @mention; knownBotUids/allowedBotUids = bot-loop guard; botBlocklist = uids whose DMs are dropped.
bots._comment_trigger: Per-bot trigger pipeline policy (issue #105). aiBroadcast = deny|allowlist|allow (default deny — pure @AI without @mention/@all does not trigger). replyToBotEnabled = true|false (default true — quote-replies to the bot continue the thread). mentionFreeGroups = channel ids that answer without an @mention.
bots._comment_skills: Skills/workflows are NOT configured here. Each bot owns its own under ~/.octobuddy/<id>/.claude/skills/<name>/ and ~/.octobuddy/<id>/.claude/workflows/<name>.js.

bots._comment_persona: Persona clone (openclaw OBO): replies in the grantor's voice. uid is the grantor's server uid; name is woven into the persona system prompt; personaPrompt is optional.

onBehalfOf.name: Admin
onBehalfOf.personaPrompt: Always reply concisely and in English.
